reasoning: Hoành Thánh means wonton; Soup Hoành Thánh = Wonton Soup.
Chim Cút Rôti translates to roasted quail.
Bánh Oai Vạc, fried or steamed dumplings, matches Saigon ravioli.
Bánh Bột Chiên Hành is a fried scallion flour cake (scallion pancake).
Bún Xào Đồ Biển = sautéed vermicelli with seafood, often with lemongrass.
Bánh Xèo is the Vietnamese crepe with shrimp, pork, and bean sprouts.
Gỏi Tôm Hoặc Gỏi Gà is Vietnamese salad with shrimp or chicken.
Gỏi Ngó Sen is lotus stem salad.
Phở Hoặc Mì Gà = chicken noodle soup (pho or yellow noodle).
Bò Xào Cà Ry is beef sautéed in curry sauce.
Bún Bò Huế is Hue-style spicy lemongrass beef noodle soup.
Thịt Lụi refers to skewered grilled meat; matches teriyaki-style choice of meat.
Bún Thịt Nướng = vermicelli with choice of grilled meat.
Bún Chả Giò = vermicelli with crispy spring rolls.
Chả Giò (2 pcs.) are crispy spring rolls.
Bún Thịt Nướng Chả Giò = vermicelli with grilled meat and crispy spring rolls.
Bún Tôm = vermicelli with grilled shrimp.
Bún Tôm Thịt Nướng Chả Giò = vermicelli with shrimp, grilled meat, and crispy spring rolls.
Cá Salmon Hoặc Cá Bông Lau Hấp = steamed salmon or catfish with aromatics.
Mì Xào = sautéed crispy yellow noodle.
